CVE-2017-6888.title: An error in the "read_metadata_vorbiscomment_()" function (src/li ...
CVE-2017-6888.summary: An error in the "read_metadata_vorbiscomment_()" function (src/libFLAC/stream_decoder.c) in FLAC version 1.3.2 can be exploited to cause a memory leak via a specially crafted FLAC file.
